song.title: All Who Are Thirsty
song.author: Brenton Brown and Glenn Robertson
song.copyright: 1998 Vineyard Songs (UK/Eire) (Admin. by Vineyard Music UK)
song.presentation: V1 C V1 C B C
song.lyrics:
;Intro: G C2
[V1] . G All who are thirsty . Bm All who are weak . C2 Just come to the fountain . Am7 Am7/B C Dip your heart in the stream of life . G Let the pain and the sorrow . Bm Be washed away . C2 In the waves of His mercy . Am7 Am7/B C As the deep cries out to deep
(We sing)
[C] .G C2 Come, Lord Jesus, come Come, Lord Jesus, come Come, Lord Jesus, come Come, Lord Jesus, come
[B] . G Won't You come . Bm Won't You come . C2 Won't You come .Am7 Am7/B Nothing but Your will for me, .C G I am only free when You come
